title: Dimensional Dungeons x Cobblemon!
description: This Datapack adds Cobblemon Spawns to the Dimensional Dungeons mod!
body:
Transform the Dimensional Dungeons into a trial of ancient guardians and digital sentinels! This datapack brings 29 carefully selected Pokémon to the mysterious dungeon biome, featuring cryptic Unown inscriptions, mechanical constructs, and spectral lurkers. Every encounter feels like it belongs in a labyrinthine trial chamber! This pack was created for my modpack "Cobblemon Side by Side"!

Features:

29 Pokémon designed for dungeon exploration
Legendary encounters — Registeel, Regirock, and Regice as ultra-rare dungeon bosses
Themed encounters — ancient constructs, digital entities, and ghostly guardians
Light-based spawning — different Pokémon appear in lit vs. dark corridors
Evolution lines — complete chains for Porygon, Klink, Duskull, and more
Smart spawn blocking — no spawns on dungeon floor tiles for clean gameplay
Ultra-rare spawns — including Spiritomb, Porygon-Z, and the Regi trio!

Encounter Themes:

Ancient Mysteries — Unown, Sigilyph, Baltoy/Claydol, Elgyem/Beheeyem
Living Constructs — Golett/Golurk, Bronzor/Bronzong, Nosepass/Probopass
Digital Security — Porygon → Porygon2 → Porygon-Z
Dungeon Machinery — Klink → Klang → Klinklang
Spectral Guardians — Duskull line, Shuppet/Banette, Shedinja, Spiritomb
Legendary Titans — Registeel, Regirock, Regice as ultimate challenges

Perfect for: Modpack creators, server owners, and players who want immersive Pokémon encounters that match the trial dungeon atmosphere!

All the spawns:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

https://docs.google.com/document/d/122UNuncN8gPDVonkggDoLRB_Pm-RGTN-/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=108711823711791867777&rtpof=true&sd=true

</details>





Installation:

Download the datapack
Place in world/datapacks or Open Loader/Other datapack loaders data folder
Run /reload
Start exploring!

Requires: Cobblemon 1.6.1+ and Dimensional Dungeons mod
